// Services

What We
Build

Five core disciplines. One focused operator. Every engagement is scoped to your exact problem — no bloated retainers, no off-the-shelf solutions.

Wichita, KS
5 Service Areas
Project & Retainer Models
01

Service
Pillars

01
Data Analytics
Transform scattered business data into dashboards and live reporting pipelines that drive real decisions — not just presentations.
Deliverables
  • Custom KPI dashboards
  • SQL query design & optimization
  • Automated reporting pipelines
  • Data cleaning & normalization
  • Business intelligence setup
  • Excel / Sheets automation
02
Systems & Automation
Replace manual, repetitive processes with custom backend tools and integrations that run themselves — and scale with you.
Deliverables
  • API integrations & webhooks
  • Custom scripts & internal tooling
  • CRM & data sync workflows
  • Scheduled automation pipelines
  • Notification & alerting systems
  • Admin dashboards & portals
03
Process Streamlining
Map, analyze, and redesign business operations to eliminate bottlenecks, reduce overhead, and recapture lost time across your team.
Deliverables
  • Workflow audits & process mapping
  • SOP documentation & templates
  • Tool stack evaluation & cleanup
  • Manual-to-digital migration plans
  • Bottleneck & waste analysis
  • Implementation roadmaps
04
AI-Augmented Workflows
Embed large language models and AI tooling into your existing processes — document analysis, content generation, and intelligent decision support.
Deliverables
  • LLM-powered internal tools
  • Document parsing & data extraction
  • AI classification pipelines
  • GPT / Claude API integrations
  • Prompt engineering & optimization
  • Custom chatbots & assistants
05
Web & CMS
Professional websites and content platforms built for performance, clarity, and conversion. Hand-coded or Webflow — built to last and grow.
Deliverables
  • Custom site design & development
  • Webflow builds & migrations
  • CMS setup, structure & training
  • SEO foundations & metadata
  • Performance & Core Web Vitals
  • Landing pages & microsites
02

Pricing &
Engagement

We work both project-based and retainer. Pricing reflects scope — not arbitrary hourly rates. Every engagement starts with a free scoping call.

Project-Based
Starter
$500 – $1,500 / per project
Scoped deliverables, fast turnaround.
Best for One-time projects & early-stage businesses
  • Single-scope deliverable
  • 1–2 week delivery window
  • One revision round included
  • Email support throughout
  • Handoff documentation
Dashboard buildAutomation scriptLanding page
Start a Project
Monthly Retainer
Growth
$1,500 – $3,000 / per month
Ongoing partnership, continuous delivery.
Best for Growing businesses with recurring data or dev needs
  • 4–8 hrs/week engagement
  • Priority response & support
  • Monthly strategy review call
  • Iterative builds & improvements
  • Rollover hrs (up to 4/mo)
Ongoing analyticsMaintained automationContinuous dev
Start a Conversation
Enterprise Scope
Custom
Quoted
after discovery call
Complex problems, tailored solutions.
Best for Larger orgs, multi-system builds, long-term roadmaps
  • Discovery & scoping session
  • Dedicated point of contact
  • Multi-deliverable roadmap
  • Custom SLA & review cadence
  • Flexible engagement model
Full system buildsMulti-dept rolloutsStrategic retainers
Book a Discovery Call

All projects include a scoping call, written proposal, and clear milestone structure. No surprise overages — scope changes are agreed in writing before work begins.

// Ready to Build

Have a Problem.
Not a Plan?

A free 30-minute call to understand your problem and assess fit. If it makes sense to move forward, you'll know exactly what the next step looks like.
